category_sources: Official GitHub README says LTeX+ LS implements a Language Server Protocol server using LanguageTool for grammar and spelling in markup documents.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is 'LTeX+ LS — LTeX+ Language Server'; source_facts.description calls it LTeX+ Language Server.
docs_sources: Official project website is linked from the GitHub README as the place for installation and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists LSP, LanguageTool, grammar/spelling, LaTeX, Markdown, and other markup support.
